Contracting Authority: Länder des Entwicklungsverbundes (16 Bundesländer + Bund), vertreten durch den Freistaat Bayern, vertreten durch das Bayerische Staatsministerium der Justiz
Project Description:
- Support services for Project GeFa in the client's project management (PMO)
- Roles: External Program Lead, PMO-Lead, Release-Train-Engineer, Release Manager, Scrum-Master (max. 4), PMO staff (max. 4)
- Aim: develop a user-friendly, accessible, future-proof case management system for ordinary courts, public prosecutors and specialist jurisdictions across all 16 Länder and the Bund
- Framework agreement without reopening competition; 6-year term
Important Dates:
- Questions deadline: 30/09/2024 10:00 +02:00
- Bid validity: 85 Tag
- Preliminary award notice (§134 GWB): 28/10/2024
- Binding period (internally stated): 31/12/2024

Scope & Requirements.Scope & Requirements:
Lot 1 — Support services for Project GeFa PM (LOT-0001)
- Deliverables:
  - External Program Lead: overall program control (time, scope, budget), governance, escalations, reporting to PLA/StMJ, procurement execution
  - PMO-Lead: admin & steering; planning/process mgmt; budget/controlling; reporting/monitoring (status, risk, progress)
  - Release-Train-Engineer (SAFe): ART facilitation; Scrum of Scrums; PI planning/I&A moderation; impediment/risk mgmt; DoR/DoD evolution; cross-team coaching
  - Release Manager: release/ deployment planning & execution; change/versioning; rollback capability; KPI reporting; stakeholder comms
  - Scrum-Master (up to 4): team coaching; events moderation; impediment tracking; metrics; transparency across teams
  - PMO staff (up to 4): execute PMO tasks under PMO-Lead
- Key requirements & constraints:
  - Language: fluent German C2 (GER) for all proposed consultants (KO; doubts for PL and deputy lead to exclusion)
  - Education: at least Bachelor; MINT Bachelor required for External Program Lead & Release Manager
  - Work location: services (incl. by subcontractors/tools ops) exclusively from GPA states (KO)
  - Team availability: Mon–Fri 08:00–16:00; response to non‑ad‑hoc requests ≤3 working days
  - Handover at contract end: up to 60 PT; service time Mon–Fri 08:00–16:00; response ≤8h within service time
  - Tools/methods: SAFe; Scrum; JIRA/Confluence; PMO tools (MS Office, SharePoint, MS Project); Requirements Engineering tools (e.g., IBM Rational Jazz)
  - Planning/Call-offs: rolling 3‑month planning; further call‑offs ≥3 months lead time; no minimum take-up; change requests for changes to call‑offs
  - Travel/expenses: included in offered prices; travel time not remunerated
  - Delivery mode: primarily remote or contractor site; occasional onsite at StMJ/Judiciary locations (mainly Munich)
  - Personnel: one person max. one role; per role max. two part‑time resources per 1 FTE
  - Staffing baseline: at least 20 employees with prior comparable project work (KO)
  - Security/Confidentiality: formal commitment of non‑civil servants; GDPR AVV incl. TOMs mandatory; EVB‑IT Dienstleistungs‑AGB apply
  - Subcontractors: prior consent; staffing agencies and chain sub‑contracting prohibited; submit contracts ≥4 weeks before use
Scope & Requirements.Contract Volume: - Max hours (6 years): Program Lead 6,336 h; PMO-Lead 10,560 h; RTE 8,624 h; Release Manager 9,328 h; Scrum-Master (≤4) 21,120 h; PMO staff (≤4) 42,240 h; 19% USt; no take-up obligation
Scope & Requirements.Place of Performance:
- 80335 München (DE212)
- Remote delivery permitted from GPA states; occasional onsite at Bavarian/other Länder justice locations
Scope & Requirements.Standards & Certifications:
- Language: German C2 (GER)
- Education: min. Bachelor; MINT Bachelor for External Program Lead & Release Manager
- Project mgmt certs: IPMA Level D/C/B (or equivalent) expected
- Agile certs: Scrum Master/Product Owner/RTE; SAFe
- GDPR: AVV + TOMs submission with bid
- EVB-IT Dienstleistungs-AGB 2.1 apply
Scope & Requirements.Subcontracting & Consortia:
- Consortia allowed; joint and several liability; authorized representative required
- Subcontractors need prior written consent; provide contracts ≥4 weeks pre‑use; must perform core work themselves
- No personnel service providers; no chain subcontracting; work only from GPA states
Scope & Requirements.Forms & e-Submission:
- Electronic submission required (German); Textform §126b BGB
- Portals: https://www.auftraege.bayern.de and deeplink on eVergabe
- Use provided forms/price items; attach TOMs and personnel profile forms

Offer Submission Documents: Personalprofile für: Program Lead, PMO-Lead, RTE, Release Manager, Scrum-Master #1-#4
List of Documents: Nachweis Berufshaftpflicht (≥2 Mio. EUR) oder Zusage vor Zuschlag

Economic & Financial Standing.Minimum Turnover: Mind. 5 Mio. EUR in Summe aus agilen/technischen Beraterrollen in den letzten 3 abgeschlossenen Geschäftsjahren (bei Bietergemeinschaft: kumulativ)
Economic & Financial Standing.Turnover in Comparable Services: Erklärung zu jährlichem Umsatz in agilen/technischen Beraterrollen für die letzten 3 Geschäftsjahre

Legal & Registration.Self-declarations (GWB §§123/124 or equi: Zwingende/fakultative Ausschlussgründe; Steuern/Abgaben/SV; MiLoG/AEntG/AÜG; LkSG; keine Wettbewerbsverstöße; Russland-Sanktionskonformität (>10% Drittanteile ausgeschlossen)
Legal & Registration.Subcontractor Identification & Reliance: Benennung UAs; Eignungsleihe mit Nachweisen; UA-Verträge ≥4 Wochen vor Einsatz; GPA-Standortpflicht

Technical & Professional Ability.Personnel Profiles:
- Roles (8 profiles): External Program Lead; PMO-Lead; Release-Train-Engineer; Release Manager; Scrum-Master #1–#4
- Common musts: German C2 (GER); ≥Bachelor (MINT for Program Lead & Release Manager); one person max. one role; ≤2 part-time per FTE
- Program Lead: last 5y leadership (IT), agile leadership, personnel responsibility; public IT project exp.; certs (IPMA D/C/B+); agile certs
- PMO-Lead: years in PMO admin/steering; planning/process mgmt; budget/controlling; reporting/monitoring; PM certs; PMO tools (MS Office/SharePoint/Project); RE tools (JIRA/Confluence/IBM Rational Jazz)
- RTE: years as SM/PO; Agile SW Requirements; agile estimating; moderate Scrum events; PI Planning/I&A; SAFe scaling; ART definition & 3+ PIs; QA/coaching history; agile certs
- Release Manager: years as RM (last 10y); # of releases; Agile SW Requirements; PM & agile certs; tools (Office/SharePoint/Project); JIRA/Confluence; agile RM experience (Scrum/Kanban)
- Scrum-Master: years as SM; Agile SW Requirements; agile estimating; event moderation; # SM projects; concepts to adapt process; QA; coaching; agile certs
- Year counting: 1 year = ≥200 project days in the role; project counting thresholds: ≥100 PT (most); QA/coaching ≥50 PT
Technical & Professional Ability.Headcount / Staffing:
- Min. 20 employees with comparable project experience (KO)
- Team availability: Mon–Fri 08:00–16:00; response ≤3 working days
- 3‑month rolling call‑offs; optional up to 4 Scrum-Masters & 4 PMO staff
Technical & Professional Ability.Reference Projects:
- Provide per-person tables of projects/roles/periods; link publications where applicable
- Counting rules: project credit ≥100 PT (general), ≥50 PT (QA/coaching)
- Evidence: client verifiable; year = ≥200 PT in role

Company Referrals:
- Min. 3 reference projects with the bid (KO)
- Each reference must meet: duration ≥3 Jahre; ≥3 consultants simultaneously and continuously; work in agile SW development
- Use template ‘Vorlage Referenzprojekte.docx’; ~5 pages per reference; include client contact (name/phone/email); verifiable by contracting authority
Award Criteria:
- Price: 50%
- Quality: 50% (Extended Richtwertmethode; 6% band; award to highest Leistung within band)
- Quality breakdown:
  - K4 Team organisation: 11.43%
  - K5 Cooperative collaboration: 17.14%
  - K6 Methodical/content approach (incl. onboarding): 21.43%
  - K7 Qualifications & experience (personnel profiles): 50.00%
    - Inter-profile weights: Program Lead 20%; PMO‑Lead 15%; RTE 20%; Release Manager 15%; Scrum‑Master #1–#4 each 7.5%
    - Scoring per attribute: 0–5 points scale; weighted per criterion matrices
- PMO staff not evaluated in K7
